mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) as todayOrderCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) as todayAmount, COUNT(*) as totalOrderCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as totalAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member) as totalMemberCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN processed = 0 THEN 1 END) as unprocessedCount FROM orders

select.if: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m-%d') as label, COUNT(*) as orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM orders WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY DATE(create_time)

SELECT CONCAT('第', WEEK(create_time, 1), '周') as label, COUNT(*) as orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM orders WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 WEEK) GROUP BY WEEK(create_time, 1) ORDER BY WEEK(create_time, 1)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') as label, COUNT(*) as orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount FROM orders WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m')

mapper.select: SELECT m.id as memberId, m.name, mp.phone, ml.name as levelName, COUNT(o.id) as orderCount, IFNULL(SUM(o.total_amount), 0) as totalAmount FROM member m LEFT JOIN member_phone mp ON mp.member_id = m.id AND mp.id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM member_phone WHERE member_id = m.id) LEFT JOIN member_level ml ON ml.id = m.level_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.member_id = m.id GROUP BY m.id HAVING orderCount > 0 ORDER BY totalAmount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
